match:
uniqueStrings(
        observations
          .map((entry) => entry.sender)
          .filter((sender): sender is string => Boolean(sender)),
      ).slice(0, MATRIX_POST_HEALTHY_SYNC_DECRYPT_FAILURE_SAMPLE_LIMIT)
